idx.lead: Outpatient intensive care at your home or in our facility in Kassel — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
idx.accent: Since 2013, we have been caring for people with serious medical conditions. With a team of registered specialists, we guarantee 24/7 care at the highest level — in the patient's own home or in cooperating residential projects in the Kassel and Waldeck-Frankenberg area.
idx.srv1.p: Round-the-clock professional care delivered in the comfort of your own home.
idx.srv2.p: Safe. Familiar. With heart and expertise.
idx.srv3.h3: Individual Care Counseling acc. to § 37.3 SGB XI / § 7 SGB XI
idx.srv3.p: We offer individual care consultations for those in need of care and their relatives to ensure optimal care in the home environment.
idx.quote: The well-being of the patient is our highest priority.
idx.step1.p: Free and no-obligation — we take the time to understand your situation and advise you personally.
idx.step2.p: We develop a tailored care plan, coordinate with your physicians, and handle insurance coverage.
idx.step3.p: Your dedicated care team starts providing professional, reliable support.
idx.about.p: KSK Farmos GmbH & Co. KG was founded in 2013 by Viktor Beresnev in Volkmarsen. Since then, we have been caring for patients across Hesse — with heart, expertise, and state-of-the-art equipment.
idx.about.q: 5.5 staff per patient — far above the industry average.
idx.dual.left.p: We'll guide you personally — free of charge and with no strings attached.
idx.dual.right.p: Above-average pay, continuous training, and a company car.
lei.lead: Home intensive care, a unique residential concept, and ongoing professional training — all under one roof.
lei.h.p: We care for patients with serious medical conditions in their own homes — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.
lei.beat: Ventilation care is our core expertise. We support patients requiring invasive and non-invasive ventilation — with experienced professionals, cutting-edge equipment, and close collaboration with pulmonologists and anesthesiologists.
lei.a.p: Our outpatient care service specializes in caring for people with dementia in various residential projects. In a protected, home-like environment, we enable a dignified life with structure, safety, and individual attention.
lei.f.p: We offer individual care consultations for those in need of care and their relatives to ensure optimal care in the home environment.
lei.f1.p: Advice on care levels and benefits from the care insurance fund.
lei.f2.p: Instruction and training for relatives on home care.
lei.f3.p: Assistance in organizing medical aids (care beds, rollators, etc.).
lei.f4.p: Counseling on dementia and dealing with challenging behavior.
lei.f5.p: Explanation of support and relief services available to caring relatives.
lei.f6.p: Advice on home adaptations and accessibility.
lei.f7.p: Pulmonary contusion, hemothorax, pneumothorax, cardiac contusion.
lei.f8.p: Heat and cold injuries, burns, inhalation trauma.
lei.k.lead: Experienced staff from KSK Farmos GmbH & Co. KG handle negotiations with cost carriers regarding the financing of 24-hour intensive care after receiving power of attorney. These are usually:
lei.k1.p:
The health insurance fund pays for medical treatment, regardless of the care level:
  • Doctor visits and therapies (physio-, occupational, speech therapy)
  • Hospital treatment
  • Medicines, remedies and aids (e.g. wheelchair, nursing bed – with approval)
  • Home nursing care in case of acute illness or after hospital stay
lei.k2.p: The care insurance fund pays for nursing support in case of need for care (care level required):
lei.k3.p: If the costs of the actual care need exceed the benefits of the above-mentioned cost bearers (care insurance fund), the remaining share of the costs must either be borne privately or — if the requirements are met — covered by various offices (social welfare office, state aid, regional council).
lei.k4.p: An additionally concluded health or accident insurance policy can cover a portion of the incurred costs, depending on the assessment.
cta.beratung.p: We'll advise you personally — no cost, no obligation.
kar.lead: Above-average pay, continuous professional development, and a team that has your back.
kar.ben.h2: Your benefits at KSK Farmos GmbH & Co. KG
kar.b1.p: We pay significantly above the tariff — because your work is worth a lot to us.
kar.b2.p: Friendly atmosphere, mutual support, and genuine appreciation.
kar.b3.p: Regular training and further education opportunities through institutes with certificate issuance — fully funded by the company.
kar.b4.p: We take your private and professional life into consideration and design our scheduling flexibly.
kar.b5.p: You make a real difference in the lives of seriously ill people every day.
kar.b6.p: Advancement opportunities and support for personal development. Your performance and commitment can lead to new career opportunities with us.
kar.bew1.p: Via our form, email, or by phone.
kar.bew2.p: We'd love to meet you — relaxed and on equal footing.
kar.bew3.p: Thorough onboarding, training, and ongoing support.
kar.wiz.p: No cover letter needed — just leave your details and we'll reach out to you.

faq.lead: Answers to the most important questions about our intensive care services.
faq.q1: Is intensive care at home really possible?
faq.a1: Yes — in many cases, comprehensive intensive care can be provided right in your own home. The prerequisite is a doctor's prescription for home nursing care.
faq.a2: We care for patients throughout Hesse — from Volkmarsen and Kassel to Frankfurt and beyond.
faq.q3: Who bears the cost of intensive care?
faq.a3: In most cases, the costs are fully covered by health and care insurance. We take care of all communication with the funding bodies.
faq.q4: Is the care level relevant for 24h care?
faq.a4: 24-hour intensive care is primarily funded through §37 SGB V and is not directly tied to the care level. A higher care level may unlock additional benefits.
faq.q5: How long does it take until care begins?
faq.a5: From the initial consultation to the start of care, it typically takes 4 to 6 weeks.
faq.q6: What qualifications does your nursing staff have?
faq.a6: All medically prescribed measures are carried out exclusively by certified nursing professionals who are regularly trained by specialist physicians.
faq.q7: What does the residential care concept include?
faq.a7: In our assisted living projects, we offer clients private rooms, a garden, a library, and 24h care with 5.5 staff members per client.
faq.a8: Via the quick application form on our website, by phone, or by email to pflege@ksk-farmos.de.
faq.top1.p: Intensive care is usually covered in full by health insurance.
faq.top2.p: From initial consultation to the start of care: approximately 4–6 weeks.
faq.top3.p: All services are delivered by certified, continuously trained professionals.
faq.cta.p: Reach out to us directly — we're happy to help.
kon.form.p: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
kon.form.call: You can also call us directly:
ber.lead: We take the time to listen — in person, by phone, or via email.
ub.lead: Since 2013, we've been caring for people with serious illnesses — with professionalism, compassion, and reliability.
ub.hist.p1: KSK Farmos GmbH & Co. KG was founded in 2013 by Viktor Beresnev in Volkmarsen — with one clear goal: to give people with serious medical conditions the chance to live with dignity and independence.
ub.hist.p2: Since then, we've been caring for patients across Hesse — in their own homes or in our residential facility in Kassel.
ub.lb1.p: Fostering independence and accompanying natural healing.
ub.lb2.p: Targeted care to preserve and restore bodily functions.
ub.lb3.p: Monitoring progress and responding early when needed.
ub.lb4.p: Emotional and physical well-being always in focus.
ub.team.h2: The People Behind KSK Farmos GmbH & Co. KG
ub.team3.name: Our Care Team
ub.koop.6: Health, care and social insurance funds
idx.review1.text: "An incredibly competent and compassionate team. The 24-hour care in Kassel has been an enormous relief for our family. We feel perfectly cared for."
idx.review1.author: Familie M. Family members, Kassel
idx.review2.text: "Thanks to KSK Farmos GmbH & Co. KG's home intensive care, my father can stay in his familiar surroundings. Reliable and always friendly."
idx.review2.author: Thomas W. Family member, Volkmarsen
idx.review3.text: "From the initial consultation to the implementation of care, everything went smoothly. The nurses are highly qualified and work very professionally."
idx.review3.author: Sabine K. Patient, Korbach
faq.q9: How does the transition from hospital to home work?
faq.a9: We handle the entire transition management. Our team coordinates a seamless handover in close consultation with hospital staff and organizes all necessary medical equipment.
faq.q10: Do we have to buy medical equipment ourselves?
faq.a10: No. All medical devices such as ventilators and monitors are provided by the health insurance. We work closely with specialized medical technology companies.
faq.q11: Are nursing staff present at night as well?
faq.a11: Yes. With 24-hour intensive care, a certified nurse is always on-site — including at night — to ensure continuous and safe monitoring.

ub.team3.desc: Around 30 employees — qualified, empathetic, and reliably in action.
lei.diag1.desc: Specialized intensive care for people dependent on invasive or non-invasive ventilation. We ensure continuous monitoring and professional equipment management.
lei.diag2.desc: Holistic long-term care for patients with severe consciousness disorders. Our focus is on basal stimulation and the preservation of bodily functions.
lei.diag3.desc: Individual support for progressive neurological changes — empathetic, professionally grounded, and focused on maintaining quality of life.
lei.diag4.desc: Professional support and care for people with spinal cord injuries. We promote independence and actively prevent complications.
lei.diag5.desc: Long-term care after severe brain injuries. Focused on stabilizing the condition and providing support in daily life.
